name: FlightTracker3D
short_description: Track the real-time location of any aircraft, all in 3D.
detailed_description:
FlightTracker3D is a 3D flight tracker made in Unreal Engine that allows you to visualise the real-time location and movement of any aircraft around the world.

High quality 3D models

FlightTracker3D provides high quality models and custom liveries for over 50 unique aircraft. Each model also has fully animated landing gear and engines, to ensure that the aircraft being tracked is rendered accurately and realistically.

High quality 3D terrain

FlightTracker3D also provides highly detailed 3D terrain data for surrounding buildings, airports, and structures for the aircraft being tracked.

Realistic plane movement

FlightTracker3D automatically calculates the acceleration, deceleration, roll, pitch, and yaw of the aircraft being tracked based on its flight path, allowing the aircraft to move more realistically.

Wide coverage

Flight data used by FlightTracker3D is provided by Airplanes.live, ensuring that FlightTracker3D is able to track a wide range of flights around the world.
